titleStmt.title: SII 26.177: original edition by P. R. Srinivasan
No. 177. (A.R. No. 166 of 1909.) SAṄGRĀMANALLŪR, UDUMALAIPET TALUK, COIMBATORE DISTRICT.

summary.p: Slab set up in front of the central shrine in the same temple.

p.hi: No King: (Vīrarājēndra): Vīḷambi, Āṉi 3 = May 29, 1238 A.D.

summary.p: This is a late record. It registers the gift of the six villages, viz., Vīrachōḻapuram, Irraṭṭayaṁpāḍi, Mūlaikkallāpuram, Śiṉṉākkalaimaṟi, Mēlaikkaṇṇāḍipputtūr and Tēṉi in favour of (the deity) Nittiyappar, by Āṇḍaperumāḷayyaṉ, the agent of a certain [.]shamaṇappa-nāyakkar-ayyaṉ. The record was written by Chidambaranāthan on the orders of Śevandinātha-piḷḷai, the temple accountant.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
§ viḷampi varuṣam Āṉi
mātam 3 § śrīmatu ṣamaṇap
pa nāyakkar Ayyaṉavar
kaḷ kāriyattukku kaṟtarāṉa
Āṇṭaperumāḷ Ayyaṉ
coṟpaṭikku cittanātar kal
poṭṭatukku vivaram nitti
yappāṟkku viracoḻapuram
Iraṭṭayampāṭi mūlaikkal
lāpuram ciṉṉākkalaimaṟi
melaikkaṇṇāṭipput
tūr teṉi Itukaḷellām
nittiyappāṟkku kaṭṭaḷaiyiṭṭa
paṭi Itukku yātāmoruvar
Akitam paṇṇiṉāl keṅ
kaik karaiyil kārāmpacuvaik
koṉṟa toṣattilum pirāma
ṇaraik koṉṟa toṣattilu
m peṟṟa tāyaikkoṉṟa
toṣattilum pokak kaṭavā
rākavum pūṟuvāpūṟuvam naṭantapaṭi
kku yeppayappaṭṭa payirum Aṉu
pūvattukkoḷḷak kaṭavārā
kavum talattuk kaṇakku cevanti
nāta piḷḷai colpaṭi citampa
ranātaṉ Eḻuttu §
Digital edition of SII 26.177 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
